allowed_outputs: rerun bounded analysis after source addition
claim_boundary: Phase 15 creates implementation suggestion scaffolds only. It does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, legal/medical/financial advice, policy decision support, or truth resolution.
phase15_goal: Create implementation-option records that map Phase 14 review suggestions to safe next steps: inspect, add source, batch review, park, or prepare human-review queue.
purpose: Convert bounded scenario review suggestions into practical real-world implementation scaffolds without recommending autonomous action or high-stakes decisions.
